title: Karuppu Nila
desc: After his father is falsely accused of aiding terrorists, Shanmuga Pandian's girlfriend leaves him. However, he joins forces with Nandhini and battles against all odds to clear his father's name.

title: Jai
desc: Jai, a young boy, witnesses the murder of his parents at the hands of their greedy manager. When he grows up, he sets out with his caretaker to avenge the wrongs done to his family.

title: Veluchami
desc: A man raises Veluchami, an orphan, alongside his daughter. However, when he tries to give his daughter to a temple, Veluchami ends up marrying her to keep her safe.

title: Chidambarathil Oru Appasamy
desc: A school teacher leads a carefree life without any goal. However, a pilgrimage to Sabrimalai transforms his life and the lives of his loved ones forever.

title: Parasuram
desc: An investigative journalist plans revenge on an industrialist who killed his family members when his corrupt businesses were exposed.
